name: Brain agent CLIs (copilot, opencode, qmd)
description: Installs the npm-global agent CLIs and the native-build toolchain at IMAGE-BUILD time, where the network is unrestricted. The egress-locked runtime then never has to compile or download them (qmd pulls native modules — better-sqlite3, tree-sitter, node-llama-cpp — that need a C/C++ toolchain and node headers, neither reachable once the firewall is up).
